title: Having a Short Lived token after uninstalling
excerpt: Having a Short Lived token after uninstalling is important so we can do the cleanups for our users when they uninstalls the app. like I want to delete all the data my apps creates in there storage once my app is uninstal…

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml: Having a Short Lived token after uninstalling is important so we can do the cleanups for our users when they uninstalls the app. like I want to delete all the data my apps creates in there storage once my app is uninstalls.
